info.title: Skyvan API
info.description: API for managing stock purchases and inventory in the Skyvan system.

post.description: Handles user login and returns a token.

get.description: Retrieve a list of organization users with pagination, filtering, search, and ordering.

parameters.name: is_active
parameters.description: Filter users based on active status (true/false).

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Order the results using specified fields.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search users by first name, last name, email, phone, or organization name.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific user.

delete.description: Marks an organization user as deleted without removing them from the database.

put.description: Updates an existing organization user by UUID.

post.description: Creates a new user associated with an organization.

Takes a refresh type JSON web token and returns an access type JSON web
token if the refresh token is valid.

get.description:
OpenApi3 schema for this API. Format can be selected via content negotiation.

- YAML: application/vnd.oai.openapi
- JSON: application/vnd.oai.openapi+json

post.description: Close a van assignment (mark it as completed). This will set end_datetime to now and mark it as inactive.

get.description: Retrieve a list of customer payment histories with pagination, search, and ordering.

parameters.name: customer_uuid
parameters.description: Filter by customer uuid

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Order by fields like `amount` or `created_at`.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by note or type.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific customer payment history entry by UUID.

delete.description: Soft delete a specific customer payment history by UUID.

put.description: Update an existing customer payment history entry by UUID.

post.description: Create a new customer payment history entry.

get.description: Retrieve a list of customers with pagination, search, and ordering capabilities.

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Field to use for ordering results. Use `-` prefix for descending order.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search query for filtering by name or email.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific customer by UUID.
Retrieve a list of contacts associated with a specific customer.

parameters.name: customer_uuid
parameters.description: Filter contacts by customer UUID.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific contact by UUID.

post.description: Create a new contact for a specific customer by UUID.

delete.description: Soft delete a contact by UUID, marking it as deleted without removing it from the database.
Soft delete a customer by UUID, marking it as deleted without removing it from the database.

post.description: Synchronize multiple customers. If a customer exists, it updates it; otherwise, it creates a new one.

put.description: Update an existing customer by UUID.

get.description: Retrieve a list of expenses with pagination, filtering, search, and ordering capabilities.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Search by keywords in expense description.

parameters.name: is_recurring
parameters.description: Filter recurring or non-recurring expenses.

parameters.name: max_amount
parameters.description: Filter expenses with a maximum amount.

parameters.name: max_date
parameters.description: Filter expenses up to this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: min_amount
parameters.description: Filter expenses with a minimum amount.

parameters.name: min_date
parameters.description: Filter expenses from this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Field to use for ordering results.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: A search term.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter expenses by type name.

get.description: Retrieve a single expense by UUID.

delete.description: Soft delete a specific expense by UUID.

put.description: Update an existing expense entry by UUID.

* `update` - Update
* `delete` - Delete

get.description: Retrieve a list of purchase orders with pagination, search, filtering, and ordering capabilities. Available ordering fields: created_at, total_price, supplier__name.

parameters.description: Order by fields like `created_at`, `total_price`, `quantity`, `supplier_name`, or `purchase_number`.

parameters.name: product_uuid
parameters.description: Filter by product UUID.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by supplier name or product name.

parameters.name: supplier_uuid
parameters.description: Filter by supplier UUID.

get.description: Retrieve a list of suppliers with pagination, search, filtering, and ordering capabilities. Available ordering fields: created_at, updated_at, name, email.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Filter results where address contains this value.

parameters.name: created_at_after
parameters.description: Filter results where created_at is greater than or equal to this value.

parameters.name: created_at_before
parameters.description: Filter results where created_at is less than or equal to this value.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Filter results where email contains this value.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter results where name contains this value.

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Which field to use when ordering the results.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: Filter results where phone contains this value.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search query for filtering results.

parameters.name: updated_at_after
parameters.description: Filter results where updated_at is greater than or equal to this value.

parameters.name: updated_at_before
parameters.description: Filter results where updated_at is less than or equal to this value.

get.description: Retrieve details of a supplier by UUID.

delete.description: Soft delete a supplier by UUID, marking it as deleted without removing it from the database.

schema.description: Validation error or associated records prevent deletion.

put.description: Update an existing supplier by UUID.

get.description: Retrieve a list of transfers with filtering, search, and ordering capabilities.

parameters.name: created_at_after
parameters.description: Filter transfers created after this date.

parameters.name: created_at_before
parameters.description: Filter transfers created before this date.

parameters.name: destination_van
parameters.description: Filter by destination van UUID.

parameters.name: destination_warehouse
parameters.description: Filter by destination warehouse UUID.

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Order results by created_at or updated_at.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by transfer type.

parameters.name: source_van
parameters.description: Filter by source van UUID.

parameters.name: source_warehouse
parameters.description: Filter by source warehouse UUID.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status (pending, accepted, completed, rejected).

parameters.name: updated_at_after
parameters.description: Filter transfers updated after this date.

parameters.name: updated_at_before
parameters.description: Filter transfers updated before this date.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific transfer by UUID.

post.description: Accept a transfer and update stock accordingly. Only allowed if status is pending.

delete.description: Soft delete a pending transfer by UUID. Only allowed if status is still pending.

get.description: Retrieve a list of lines for a specific sale order.

post.description: Reverse an accepted transfer and create a new clone as pending.

put.description: Update a draft or pending transfer by UUID.

get.description: List all active vans with pagination, search, filtering, and ordering support. You can order by created_at, name, license_plate, or capacity.

parameters.name: is_working
parameters.description: Filter vans by working status. true = currently assigned, false = not working.

parameters.name: license_plate
parameters.description: Filter vans by license plate (case-insensitive partial match).

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Which field to use when ordering the results.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search in name or license plate.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter vans by status. Available values: active, inactive, sold, broken.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific van by UUID.

delete.description: Soft delete a van (only if no active assignment or stock).

get.description: List inventory items for a specific van (by van UUID) with pagination, search and ordering.

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Order by quantity or created_at.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by product name.

parameters.name: van_uuid
parameters.description: Van UUID to fetch inventory for.

get.description: List all van assignments with pagination, search, filtering, and ordering support. You can filter by van, user, active status, and date ranges.

parameters.name: end_after
parameters.description: Filter assignments that end after a specific datetime.

parameters.name: end_before
parameters.description: Filter assignments that end before a specific datetime.

parameters.name: is_active
parameters.description: Filter by active status (true = current assignment, false = closed).

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Order results by start_datetime, end_datetime, or created_at.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by user name or van name.

parameters.name: start_after
parameters.description: Filter assignments that start after a specific datetime.

parameters.name: start_before
parameters.description: Filter assignments that start before a specific datetime.

parameters.name: user_uuid
parameters.description: Filter assignments by user UUID.

parameters.name: van_uuid
parameters.description: Filter assignments by van UUID.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific van assignment.

delete.description: Soft delete a van assignment. Only allowed if assignment is not active.

put.description: Update an existing van assignment (only start_datetime, end_datetime, and notes can be modified).

post.description: Assign a user to a van for a time period.

OrganizationUserCreate.description: Serializer for creating an organization user.

OrganizationUserUpdate.description: Serializer for updating an organization user.

ProductTypeEnum.description:
* `Physical` - Physical Product
* `Service` - Service Product
* `Digital` - Digital Product

TransferTypeEnum.description:
* `van_to_warehouse` - Van to Warehouse
* `warehouse_to_van` - Warehouse to Van
* `warehouse_to_warehouse` - Warehouse to Warehouse
* `van_to_van` - Van to Van
